endpoints.label: Get Balances Account

fields.label: Profile Name or ID
fields.description: ID of the user profile to retrieve the balance of. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

endpoints.description: Retrieve balances for all account currencies of this user

endpoints.label: Get Currencies Account
endpoints.description: Retrieve currencies in the borderless account of this user

endpoints.label: Get Statement Account

fields.label: Profile Name or ID
fields.description: ID of the user profile whose account to retrieve the statement of. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: Borderless Account Name or ID
fields.description: ID of the borderless account to retrieve the statement of. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: Currency
fields.description: Code of the currency of the borderless account to retrieve the statement of

fields.label: Format
fields.description: File format to retrieve the statement in

fields.label: File Name
fields.description: Name of the file that will be downloaded

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: lineStyle, range)

endpoints.description: Retrieve the statement for the borderless account of this user

fields.label: Source Currency
fields.description: Code of the source currency to retrieve the exchange rate for

fields.label: Target Currency
fields.description: Code of the target currency to retrieve the exchange rate for

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: interval, range, time)

fields.label: Profile Name or ID
fields.description: ID of the user profile to retrieve. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: Profile Name or ID
fields.description: ID of the user profile to create the quote under. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: Target Account Name or ID
fields.description: ID of the account that will receive the funds. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: Amount Type
fields.description: Whether the amount is to be sent or received

fields.label: Amount
fields.description: Amount of funds for the quote to create

fields.label: Source Currency
fields.description: Code of the currency to send for the quote to create

fields.label: Target Currency
fields.description: Code of the currency to receive for the quote to create

fields.label: Quote ID
fields.description: ID of the quote to retrieve

fields.label: Return All
fields.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

fields.label: Limit
fields.description: Max number of results to return

fields.label: Profile Name or ID
fields.description: ID of the user profile to retrieve the balance of. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: Quote ID
fields.description: ID of the quote based on which to create the transfer

fields.label: Target Account Name or ID
fields.description: ID of the account that will receive the funds. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: reference)

fields.label: Transfer ID
fields.description: ID of the transfer to delete

fields.label: Profile Name or ID
fields.description: ID of the user profile to execute the transfer under. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: Transfer ID
fields.description: ID of the transfer to execute

fields.label: Transfer ID
fields.description: ID of the transfer to retrieve

fields.label: Download Receipt
fields.description: Whether to download the transfer receipt as a PDF file. Only for executed transfers, having status 'Outgoing Payment Sent'.

fields.label: File Name
fields.description: Name of the file that will be downloaded

fields.label: Profile Name or ID
fields.description: ID of the user profile to retrieve. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: Return All
fields.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

fields.label: Limit
fields.description: Max number of results to return

fields.label: Filters
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: range, sourceCurrency, status, targetCurrency)
